✕

Empowering Communities HARDA is committed to transforming lives across the Horn of Africa by fostering sustainable development, empowering marginalized communities, and promoting peaceful coexistence. Learn More

Welcome to HARDA

Horn of Africa Regional Development Action (HARDA) is a non-profit organization dedicated to improving the lives of vulnerable communities in Kenya and Somalia. With over 15 years of experience in peacebuilding, sustainable development, and climate resilience, we strive to create lasting solutions for the challenges facing pastoralist and marginalized communities across the region.

Explore More

Our Impact Areas

  • Disaster Risk Reduction and Climate Change Adaptation (DRR & CCA)
  • Sustainable livelihoods
  • Education
  • Health
  • Child protection
  • Water, Sanitation and Hygiene (WASH)
  • Peace and Conflict Management
  • Environment and Natural Resources Management
  • Youth and Women Empowerment
  • Human Rights and Governance

Our Latest Achievement

At HARDA, every milestone reflects our unwavering commitment to transforming lives in the Horn of Africa. From empowering communities with sustainable livelihoods to fostering peace and building resilience against climate challenges, we are making a lasting impact. Here’s a glimpse of the positive change we’ve brought to the region through our recent initiatives.
Learn more

Join Us in Making a Difference

Be part of a movement that’s transforming lives across the Horn of Africa. At HARDA, we believe in the power of collective action to create sustainable change. Whether you’re an individual, an organization, or a donor, your support can help us empower communities, build resilience, and promote peace. Together, we can make a meaningful impact where it’s needed most.
Get Involved

What People Say About US

Testimonials Slider - HARDA

Fatuma Hassan – Mandera, Kenya

"Thanks to HARDA’s water and sanitation projects, my family now has access to clean and safe drinking water. It has changed our lives and reduced illnesses in our community."

Abdirahman Ismail – Elwak, Somalia

"The vocational training provided by HARDA gave me the skills to start my own business. I can now support my family and mentor other young people in my community."

Amina Abdullahi – Garissa, Kenya

"HARDA’s microfinance initiative helped me grow my small poultry business. Today, I am financially independent and can afford to send my children to school."

Mohamed Abdi – Gedo Region, Somalia

"HARDA’s peacebuilding efforts brought different clans together for dialogue. We now resolve conflicts peacefully, which has brought stability to our region."

Khadija Ali – Wajir, Kenya

"HARDA’s campaign for girl child education helped change mindsets in our community. My daughter now attends school and dreams of becoming a doctor."

Who We Are

Horn of Africa Regional Development Action (HARDA) is a non-profit making organization that was registered in 2008 under the name of Elwak Somalia Peace Committee (ESPC) and it has been operating in the cross-border area of Elwak Kenya and Elwak Somalia of Jubbaland Region and under the umbrella of Conflict Early Warning Early Response Unit (CEWERU).
